ActorIdentity.description: Stable actor identity recorded on runs, approvals, and audits.
ActorIdentity.title: ActorIdentity

AdminRunListResponse.description: Response for the admin run list endpoint.
AdminRunListResponse.title: AdminRunListResponse

ApprovalActionRecord.description:
A record of an approval-related action (e.g. requested, approved, denied).

Used when a node requires human or system approval before proceeding.
Tracks who took the action and when it happened.
ApprovalActionRecord.title: ApprovalActionRecord

ApprovalDecision.description:
The possible choices a human reviewer can make on an approval request.

APPROVE — accept as-is. REJECT — deny the action. EDIT_AND_APPROVE — modify
the proposed payload and then accept it.
ApprovalDecision.title: ApprovalDecision

ApprovalPausedState.description: Public state for a run paused on human approval.
ApprovalPausedState.title: ApprovalPausedState

ApprovalRecord.description:
The main approval object that tracks a single approval request.

Created when an agent workflow hits a node that requires human sign-off.
Contains everything a reviewer needs: a summary, rationale, the proposed
payload, which actions are allowed, and (once answered) the resolution.
ApprovalRecord.title: ApprovalRecord

ApprovalResolution.description:
Holds the details of how an approval was resolved.

Stores who made the decision, what they decided, any edits they made to
the payload, and when the decision happened.
ApprovalResolution.title: ApprovalResolution

ApprovalResolutionRequest.description: Request body for resolving a pending approval.
ApprovalResolutionRequest.title: ApprovalResolutionRequest

ApprovalResolutionResponse.description: Response body returned after resolving an approval.
ApprovalResolutionResponse.title: ApprovalResolutionResponse

ApprovalStatus.description:
Whether an approval request is still waiting or has been answered.

PENDING means no decision yet; RESOLVED means a human has responded.
ApprovalStatus.title: ApprovalStatus

AttestationVerificationResponse.description: Verification result for a supplied deployment attestation.
AttestationVerificationResponse.title: AttestationVerificationResponse

AuditRecordListResponse.description: Public response for deployment-scoped audit lookups.
AuditRecordListResponse.title: AuditRecordListResponse

AuditTimelineResponse.description: Public response for ordered audit timelines.
AuditTimelineResponse.title: AuditTimelineResponse

CreateSubscriptionRequest.description: Request body for creating a webhook subscription.
CreateSubscriptionRequest.title: CreateSubscriptionRequest

CreateWorkflowRequest.description: Request body for creating a new workflow.
CreateWorkflowRequest.title: CreateWorkflowRequest

DependencyStatus.description: Status of a single dependency check.
DependencyStatus.title: DependencyStatus

DeploymentAttestationResponse.description: Stable attestation payload for a deployment snapshot.
DeploymentAttestationResponse.title: DeploymentAttestationResponse

DeploymentEvidenceResponse.description: Review-friendly evidence bundle for a deployment snapshot.
DeploymentEvidenceResponse.title: DeploymentEvidenceResponse

DeploymentResultErrorStateSchemaResponse.description: Combined terminal result and error schema for a deployed version.
DeploymentResultErrorStateSchemaResponse.title: DeploymentResultErrorStateSchemaResponse

DeploymentStatus.description: Lifecycle status for immutable deployment versions.
DeploymentStatus.title: DeploymentStatus

DeploymentVersionMetadataResponse.description: Public metadata for one deployed version.
DeploymentVersionMetadataResponse.title: DeploymentVersionMetadataResponse

EvidenceSummaryResponse.description: Aggregated governance counts for an evidence bundle.
EvidenceSummaryResponse.title: EvidenceSummaryResponse

HealthResponse.description: Response payload for the wrapper health endpoint.
HealthResponse.title: HealthResponse

HumanInteractionType.description:
The kind of interaction the system is requesting from a human.

For example, "approval" means the system needs a yes/no decision,
while "clarification" means it needs more information to proceed.
HumanInteractionType.title: HumanInteractionType

LivenessResponse.description: Response payload for the liveness probe.
LivenessResponse.title: LivenessResponse

MemoryAccessRecord.description:
A record of a single memory read or write during a node execution.

Tracks which memory store was accessed, what operation was performed
(e.g. read, write, delete), and the key/value involved.
MemoryAccessRecord.title: MemoryAccessRecord

NodeAuditRecord.description:
The main audit record for a single node execution.

This is the core audit object. It captures everything that happened
when a node ran: inputs, outputs, tool calls, memory accesses,
approval actions, validation results, timing, and any errors.
NodeAuditRecord.title: NodeAuditRecord

NodeTypeResponse.description: A node type available in the Studio palette.
NodeTypeResponse.title: NodeTypeResponse

PortDefinitionResponse.description: A port on a node type.
PortDefinitionResponse.title: PortDefinitionResponse

PublicContractSchemaResponse.description: Public contract payload exposed by the deployment API.
PublicContractSchemaResponse.title: PublicContractSchemaResponse

ReadinessResponse.description: Response payload for the readiness probe.
ReadinessResponse.title: ReadinessResponse

RunEvidenceResponse.description: Review-friendly evidence bundle for a single run.
RunEvidenceResponse.title: RunEvidenceResponse

RunFailureState.description:
Details about why a run failed.

When a run ends in an error, this stores the reason and any extra details
so you can figure out what went wrong.
RunFailureState.title: RunFailureState

RunInvocationRequest.description: Request body for creating a new run.
RunInvocationRequest.title: RunInvocationRequest

RunPublicStatus.description: Public run lifecycle states returned by the HTTP API.
RunPublicStatus.title: RunPublicStatus

ServiceRole.description: Service roles used by route authorization.
ServiceRole.title: ServiceRole

StudioEdgeResponse.description: An edge as represented in the Studio frontend.
StudioEdgeResponse.title: StudioEdgeResponse

StudioNodeResponse.description: A node as represented in the Studio frontend.
StudioNodeResponse.title: StudioNodeResponse

StudioPosition.description: Canvas position for a node in the Studio editor.
StudioPosition.title: StudioPosition

StudioViewport.description: Viewport state for the Studio canvas.
StudioViewport.title: StudioViewport

TokenUsage.description:
Token consumption metrics from a single LLM provider call.

Tracks input (prompt) tokens, output (completion) tokens, total tokens,
and the model that produced them. Used by ProviderResponse and
NodeAuditRecord for cost attribution and budget enforcement.
TokenUsage.title: TokenUsage

ToolCallRecord.description:
A record of a single tool call made during a node execution.

Captures which tool was called, what arguments were passed in,
what the tool returned, and whether it produced an error.
ToolCallRecord.title: ToolCallRecord

UpdateWorkflowRequest.description: Request body for updating an existing workflow.
UpdateWorkflowRequest.title: UpdateWorkflowRequest

WebhookDeadLetterResponse.description: Response for a single dead-letter entry.
WebhookDeadLetterResponse.title: WebhookDeadLetterResponse

WebhookSubscriptionResponse.description: Response for a single webhook subscription.
WebhookSubscriptionResponse.title: WebhookSubscriptionResponse

WorkflowDetailResponse.description: Full workflow representation with nodes, edges, and viewport.
WorkflowDetailResponse.title: WorkflowDetailResponse

WorkflowSummaryResponse.description: Compact workflow representation for list views.
WorkflowSummaryResponse.title: WorkflowSummaryResponse

info.description: Governed medium-code platform for production-grade multi-agent systems
info.title: Zeroth Platform API

get.description: Return all available node types with their port definitions.

schema.title: Response List Node Types Api Studio V1 Node Types Get
Response List Workflows Api Studio V1 Workflows Get

post.description: Create a new workflow with default Studio metadata.

get.description: Get a workflow with full detail including nodes, edges, and viewport.

put.description: Update a workflow's name, nodes, edges, or viewport.

post.description: Interrupt a running run (transitions to WAITING_INTERRUPT).
Replay a dead-letter or failed run by resetting it to PENDING.

schema.title: Response List Approvals V1 Deployments  Deployment Ref  Approvals Get

get.description: Return cumulative spend for a deployment (per D-15, D-16).

schema.title: Response Get Metrics V1 Metrics Get

get.description: Return cumulative spend for a tenant (per D-14, D-16).

schema.title: Response Replay Dead Letter V1 Webhooks Dead Letters  Dead Letter Id  Replay Post
